title: ノスタルジック・ウマ娘

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ever since I officially became Nice Nature's trainer, we've been
training day in, day out.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Whew, my arms and legs are all wobbly! Guess that's a personalized
training menu for you—no punches held.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'm definitely feeling this in the morning... But what's next? Whatcha
got prepared?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In stark contrast to her usual aloof demeanor, Nice Nature is diligent
and eager when it comes to training.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hm? Cat got your tongue, Trainer?
choice_data_list:
I was just thinking about what a nice and
hard-working student you are.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?! N-nah, it's like... I gotta do what I gotta do, you know? For what it's worth, I am a Tracen student.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: C'mon, stop with the sappy stuff and tell me what I gotta do next.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After training like this for a while, our first challenge comes in the
form of a scrimmage against other students.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Phew.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Third again...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Even with my own personal trainer, even after that much
training—third is all I got in me, huh.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Haha, looks like third place is where I belong, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Goals like staying undefeated or conquering the Twinkle
Series—they're not meant for me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
No way, what're you even saying? I told you when we first met,
remember? I haven't got any talent worth writing home about.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'll still do all the training, and I'll obviously try my best to win the
races you sign me up for.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But I understand myself all too well. My talents as a racer, and my
limits too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that's enough out of me! Look, I think it's time for me to head
o—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rumble...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh? Was that you, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Haha, don't sweat it! A growing youngster's gotta eat, after all.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I've got it—come with me for a sec! There's a great place I know.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure I'm older than Nature, but before I can blurt out a witty
retort, she grabs my arm and drags me away...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Mmm, smells good! Hey pops, you got any fresh meatball skewers?

text_block_list.name: Friendly Man
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's Natie! We got meatball skewers all right—gizzard, too!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, sounds great! Then maybe I'll take one—wait, no. It's not just me
today!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I want my trainer to try the food here. Could you whip up some of
your specialities for me?

text_block_list.name: Friendly Man
text_block_list.text:
No problem, comin' right up—wait, whaaat?! You're Natie's trainer?!
Yer not pulling my leg, are ya?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ah, crud...

text_block_list.name: Friendly Man
text_block_list.text:
How rude of me! Trainer, wait right there! I'm gon' get the best food
this here shopping district has to offer!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Uh, you don't gotta—aaand he's gone. Dang, he's fast. You think he'd
run my races for me?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yeesh, I knew this would happen, so I was trying to avoid saying you
were my trainer. Man, that was a bust.
choice_data_list:
The people of the shopping district really love
you.

The people of the shopping district really love
you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well, you could say that... I mean, even at Tracen Academy, I try to
be the girl everyone feels comfortable talking to, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Back home, I lived in a shopping district just like this one. My mom
ran a little bar there, so I've been helping out since I was a kid.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Cause of that, I've talked to my fair share of grown-ups in my time,
from regulars at the bar to other shopping district denizens.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: That's probably why people tell me I act old for my age.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But it's also why I was able to meet so many friendly old folk, so all in
all, I'm pretty grateful.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Which reminds me, I wonder how the lady who ran the sweets shop
back home is doing? Hope her back isn't bothering her too much.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
She's got a scary face, but she's actually really nice. When I was little,
she'd always give me leftover candy from the shop.
choice_data_list: The folks back home must love you too.
The folks back home must love you too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Haha... Despite that, I've got no real talents worth writing home
about.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: In reality... everyone was just being nice.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I was a little bit faster than the local competition, so they cheered me
on and hyped me up. And look, it got me all the way here.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You should've been there the day I left home. They put up flags and
streamers all over the shopping district. Said it was a festival.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But now... just look at me—look at what I did with all those lofty
expectations.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: All I can get are decent results, like—

text_block_list.name: Friendly Man
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, Trainer—sorry 'bout the wait! Eat this and fill yerself right up!
We're leavin' Natie in yer capable hands!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Haha... You heard him, Trainer. Better eat up before it gets cold,
'kay?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ah, you're here! Heeey, Nature! Whew, I finally found you!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hm, Teio? What's the matter?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Haven't you seen the race program? They put it up already, you
know—for the Meet!

text_block_list.name: Friendly Man
text_block_list.text:
Oh, the legendary Tracen Meet! Tons of people come to watch every
year. I can't wait!

text_block_list.name: Friendly Man
text_block_list.text: And don't you worry, Natie, all of us are comin' to cheer you on!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Haha, I 'preciate it. I really do. But wow, I didn't think they'd have the program up this fast.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
More importantly... Teio, you came all the way here just to tell me
that?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh, you signed up for the 2000m turf race, right? Well, I did
too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
We got put in the same group! So I'm here to declare war! Nature—it's
you against me!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I-I'm racing... against you?!
